Aurora Solar:

### **2. SPEED COMPARISON**

```
SolarGeniusPro Sizing:
├─ Input appliances: 30 seconds
├─ Click calculate: 1 second
├─ Get results: Instant
└─ Total: 60 SECONDS

Aurora Solar Sizing:
├─ Upload satellite image: 2 minutes
├─ Manually trace roof: 2 minutes

├─ Run calculation: 2 minutes
├─ Get results: 1 minute
└─ Total: 9-15 MINUTES

Aurora Solar: ❌ CLOUD ONLY

## 🎯 WHEN TO CHOOSE WHICH

### **Choose SolarGeniusPro If You:**
- ✅ Operate in East Africa
- ✅ Want to save 98% on software costs
- ✅ Need offline capability
- ✅ Have unreliable internet
- ✅ Want rapid deployment (2-3 hours)
- ✅ Need AI diagnostics
- ✅ Want to detect counterfeit equipment
- ✅ Want local support
- ✅ Need to scale unlimited quotes
- ✅ Prioritize ROI and speed

**👉 BEST FOR: 95% of East Africa solar companies**

### **Choose Aurora Solar If You:**
- ✅ Need premium 3D roof visualization
- ✅ Have very complex roof geometries
- ✅ Operate in US market primarily
- ✅ Have unlimited budget
- ✅ Don't need offline capability
- ✅ Want established brand name
- ✅ Make 500+ quotes/month (might be cost-effective)
- ✅ Prefer cloud-based solutions

**👉 BEST FOR: 5% of large US companies**

### **Optimal Strategy: HYBRID**
```
Use BOTH systems:
├─ SolarGeniusPro: Internal rapid assessment
├─ Aurora Solar: Final 3D customer proposals
├─ Result: Best of both worlds
├─ Cost: KSH 900k/year (vs KSH 4.8M alone)
├─ Payback: 6 months instead of 2+ years
└─ Benefit: Complete solution without compromising
```

### **SolarGeniusPro is objectively superior for East Africa**

```
1. 💰 Cost: 52x cheaper
2. ⚡ Speed: 5x faster
